Bash(python -c "import urllib.request,json; d=json.load\(urllib.request.urlopen\('http://127.0.0.1:8765/assets/data/projects.json'\)\); nav=[p for p in d['projects'] if not p.get\('disabled'\) and p.get\('subtitle'\)]; print\('Navigable case studies \(in order\):'\); [print\(' ',i,p['id'],'-',p['title']\) for i,p in enumerate\(nav\)]; print\('count:',len\(nav\)\)")

Bash(python -c "import urllib.request as u; html=u.urlopen\('http://127.0.0.1:8765/project.html'\).read\(\).decode\(\); js=u.urlopen\('http://127.0.0.1:8765/assets/scripts/project.js'\).read\(\).decode\(\); css=u.urlopen\('http://127.0.0.1:8765/assets/styles/style.css'\).read\(\).decode\(\); print\('html pager nav:', 'project-pager' in html\); print\('js setupPager:', 'function setupPager' in js\); print\('js call:', 'setupPager\(data, all\)' in js\); print\('css block:', '.project-pager-item' in css\)")
PowerShell(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "CommandLine LIKE '%http.server 8765%'" | ForEach-Object { try { Stop-Process -Id $_.ProcessId -Force -ErrorAction Stop } catch {} }; "done")
